steps.title: Find the expanding effect
steps.content: The passage shows that witnessing a helpful act makes people “more likely to offer help” and can “inspire still others to act”—establishing a cascading pattern of encouragement.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Foster means to encourage and develop growth. Require, remember, and discourage each fail the test: they describe necessity, memory, or opposition rather than nurturing a behavior's spread. That matches choice C — C is correct.
